---
format:
    html: 
      toc: false
      code-copy: false
      code-annotations: below
reference-location: margin
citation-location: margin
listing:
  id: blog-posts
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table 
  categories: unnumbered
  fields: [date, title]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
---

```{.txt}
Welcome to my <Blog/> !
```

I write here occasionally to keep track of some important *(and some less important)* findings either API or Software Architecture related. 

The posts are arranged by date in a descending order.

::: {#blog-posts}
:::
